markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the new content strategy and performance dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content OS Live:** The Airtable Content OS is ready for review, with \~70 blog ideas targeting new keywords across key topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [**Repurposing Strategy:** N-able approved repurposing its annual threat report into smaller, gated guides to capture specific search intent and drive SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Calibration Blocked:** N-able's feedback on the Content OS is needed by EOW to select a "calibration" article, which is required to align on voice/tone before scaling production.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [**Dashboard Refinements:** The Looker dashboard needs filtering for subdomains, product themes, and "junk" impressions (e.g., from the letter "N") to improve data accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)

## Topics

### Content OS & Strategy

  - [GrowthX presented the new Airtable Content OS, the single source of truth for all content.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [**Key Tabs:**](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - [`Assignments`: \~70 blog ideas for review, targeting new keywords across topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
      - [`Target Keywords`: List of keywords with volume & difficulty metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
      - [`URL Tab`: Keyword gap analysis vs. competitors (Veeam, NinjaOne).](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [**N-able Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [**Competitor Content:** The `URL Tab` includes competitor content N-able deems low-value. N-able will add comments to guide GrowthX's ideation.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** N-able will provide a list of priority pages (e.g., product pages) for internal links.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
      - [**Paid Social:** Low-volume, niche articles (e.g., vertical-specific) are valuable for targeted paid social and email campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)

### Content Repurposing

  - [N-able approved GrowthX's proposal to repurpose its annual threat report into smaller, gated guides.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Rationale:** To capture specific search intent (e.g., "AI threat detection trends") and drive SEO by linking to these guides from relevant blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Design:** N-able's team has limited capacity. GrowthX's in-house designer is an option (2–3 week turnaround), but the cost must be confirmed.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

### Looker Dashboard Walkthrough

  - [GrowthX reviewed the Looker dashboard, which tracks performance from GA4 and GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [**Key Reports:**](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [`Overview`: Sessions vs. Engaged Sessions (currently low, \~50%).](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
      - [`Non-Branded`: Organic search traffic from non-branded queries.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
      - [`Cohort`: Tracks performance of GrowthX-published content by topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
      - [`LLM Referral Traffic`: Shows traffic from AI platforms (e.g., ChatGPT).](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [**N-able Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
      - [**Subdomain Filtering:** Add a filter for the main marketing site (`www`) to exclude subdomains like `docs` and `careers`.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
      - [**Non-Branded Filter:** Exclude product themes (e.g., "MDR") in addition to brand terms.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
      - [**Impression Filtering:** Exclude "junk" impressions (e.g., from the letter "N") to clean up data.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
      - [**Conversion Events:** N-able will specify which GA4 events are most important to track.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [Confirm if design services for gated guides are included in the package.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [Update the Content OS with a "Blog Drafts for Review" view.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
      - [Implement Looker dashboard refinements (filtering, conversion events) upon receiving N-able's specifications.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
  - [**N-able:**](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [Review Content OS and approve 2–3 blog ideas by EOW to start the calibration article.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
      - [Provide a list of priority pages for internal linking.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
      - [Specify key GA4 conversion events for tracking in Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/n414zqW_B_pQvqUNUSxmVA4SAhZJaHx5?tab=summary&timestamp=1310.0)
